topic: Duke Nicholas School — faculty call with Dr. Alvarez (coral recovery lab)
agenda: Faculty call with Dr. Alvarez to discuss the coral recovery lab and PhD fit for the 2027 cohort. Note this lands on a Friday dive shop shift window (6:30 AM to 12:30 PM ET).

topic: University of Miami Rosenstiel — prospective PhD info session
agenda: Rosenstiel School graduate info session for prospective PhD applicants. Note this lands inside the Monday 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM class block at Oakridge.

topic: Uncle Ray Mitchell's birthday
agenda: Uncle Ray Mitchell's birthday. Out on the water in the morning, family dinner at the parents' house in the evening.

topic: Linda Cash's birthday
agenda: Linda Cash's birthday. Riverfront Market booth in the morning, family dinner at the parents' house in the evening.

topic: Grandma Dorothy Mitchell's birthday
agenda: Grandma Dorothy Mitchell's birthday. Southport gathering, Uncle Ray runs the smoker.

topic: Frank Cash's birthday
agenda: Frank Cash's birthday. Truck and gear talk at the parents' house, low-key by Frank's preference.

topic: Darren's own birthday
agenda: Darren's own birthday. Dive crew at Front Street Brewery in the evening when classes allow.

topic: Christmas at Grandma Dorothy's in Southport
agenda: Christmas at Grandma Dorothy's in Southport.

topic: Brooke Cash's birthday
agenda: Brooke Cash's birthday. Art store gift card and a Cape Fear Coffee morning together.

topic: Cole Hensley's birthday
agenda: Cole Hensley's birthday. Surf at Wrightsville then dinner at Dixie Grill.

topic: Uncle Ray's 45th birthday
agenda: (Wednesday) Uncle Ray's 45th birthday. Family dinner at the parents' house, gift is the small dive knife he has been eyeing.

topic: Dive physical at Lakewood Health
agenda: (Thursday) Dive physical at Lakewood Health. Tinnitus monitoring and equalization clearance for the winter tourist push.

topic: Self-imposed graduate school program shortlist deadline
agenda: (Wednesday) Self-imposed graduate school program shortlist deadline. Finalize the list of 4 to 5 target programs.

topic: Frank's 52nd birthday
agenda: (Tuesday) Frank's 52nd birthday. Quiet evening at the parents' house, dinner Linda is cooking.

topic: First aid and CPR recertification at Kestrel Healthcare training center
agenda: (Thursday) First aid and CPR recertification at Kestrel Healthcare training center.

topic: Thanksgiving dinner at the parents' house in Wilmington
agenda: (Thursday) Thanksgiving dinner at the parents' house in Wilmington.

topic: Darren's 21st birthday
agenda: (Friday) Darren's 21st birthday. Cole, Jess, and the dive crew at Front Street Brewery in the evening.

topic: Fall 2026 final exams wrap
agenda: (Tuesday) Fall 2026 final exams wrap. Submit the coral recovery semester data package to Professor Whitfield by end of day.

topic: Christmas at Grandma Dorothy's house in Southport
agenda: (Friday) Christmas at Grandma Dorothy's house in Southport.

topic: Spring 2027 semester begins at Oakridge
agenda: (Friday) Spring 2027 semester begins at Oakridge. Honors thesis work ramps up. Registered for Ichthyology lab and Marine Conservation Policy.

topic: Graduate program application deadlines cluster opens
agenda: (Monday) Graduate program application deadlines cluster opens. Confirm transcripts, GRE waivers, and Professor Whitfield's recommendation letters are in flight.

topic: Cole's 22nd birthday
agenda: (Thursday) Cole's 22nd birthday. Surf at Wrightsville then dinner at Dixie Grill.
